ideation: This animation sequence mimics the action of inserting a floppy disk into a drive.  The robot will use its right arm to perform the action, while the left remains at its side.  The sequence will highlight the careful insertion, emphasizing the delicate nature of the floppy disk. The movement should be deliberate and controlled, not jerky or rushed.  I will use the examples as a guide for smooth transitions, and will ensure that each frame is a distinct position that contributes to the overall motion. The final frame will end with the hand gently holding the disk in place, conveying a sense of successful completion.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides
right arm extends forward, ready to insert
the hand carefully guides the disk into the slot
disk is gently seated, action complete
